message.content:
@startuml
title Sequence diagram for the whole CCX (external) data pipeline

package "Insights operator" as insights {
  participant "Control logic" as control_logic
  participant "IO memory cache" as io_cache
}

participant "Smart Proxy" as smart_proxy
participant "3Scale" as three_scale
participant "CRD" as crd
participant "OCP WebConsole" as ocp_webconsole

activate insights

note over insights: Pulling data from Smart Proxy

control_logic -> three_scale: Get recommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
three_scale -> smart_proxy: Get recommendations\norg ID\ncluster ID
smart_proxy --> three_scale: Recommendations for cluster
three_scale --> insights: Recommendations for cluster

activate insights
note over insights: Exposing recommendations

control_logic -> io_cache: Store recommendations
io_cache --> crd: Expose recommendations

activate insights
note over insights: Pulling from OCP WebConsole

crd --> ocp_webconsole: Read recommendations
ocp_webconsole --> crd: Here are required data

deactivate insights

deactivate insights

note right of insights: Copyright © 2020 Red Hat, Inc. Author: Pavel Tisnovsky

@enduml
